{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Aethertech body
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|An [[Aethertech body]] is an endlessly regenerating body for a soul.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c3">''The Knight'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
